steps.description: Click the “Source Control” icon (third item with the branch symbol and "M3" badge) in the left sidebar of the Visual Studio Code interface to open the Source Control view.
Click the "Build a Declarative Agent" option from the dropdown menu in the "Select a Tutorial to Get Started" dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.
Right-click the "Walkthrough: Setup VS Code" tab in the Visual Studio Code workspace header to open its context menu.
Click the "Close" option in the tab context menu to close the "Walkthrough: Setup VS Code" tab in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Create a New Agent/App" button in the MICROSOFT 365 AGENTS TOOLKIT panel on the left side of the Visual Studio Code interface.
